creator: zleslie@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks you for the effort.

I'm excited to hear you've started the puppet5 work.  I've been reading over the release notes but haven't been able to make the updates to the other ports yet.

I'd really like to get sysutils/facter bumped so we can rely on it in the puppet ports.  It should help agent run time considerably, but I'm blocked on a leatherman update.

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=220471
